        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Request asking about smart home systems, gaming setups, or automated appliances (no field for connected home tech)', 'Coverage for smart home integration or automation systems (not in template fields)', 'Home Maintenance Program including preventive inspections and priority repairs (no maintenance/repair concept in schema)', 'Emergency Response Service for water/fire/power incidents (not within allowed emergency support or coordination types)', 'Gaming Equipment Coverage and coverage for collectibles/premium kitchen equipment (no field for collectibles or gaming equipment)', 'Eco-friendly replacement options and long-term premium reductions due to smart monitoring (no sustainability or dynamic pricing fields)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Health plan options with mental health coverage and telemedicine included', 'Property insurance options with electronics, business equipment, and liability coverage', 'Travel insurance options with concierge medical support and business travel protection', 'Coverage tiers (standard, premium, executive)', 'Monthly cost and currency values for each plan', 'Coverage limits (e.g., €65,000, €200,000)', 'Claims processing time (e.g., 3–10 business days)', 'Temporary accommodation coverage', 'Luxury item and art coverage', 'Natural disaster coverage', 'Comparison of total monthly cost and savings from current level', 'Proposal preparation or documentation request for selected plan', 'Location context (Paris household, frequent travelers) represented via geographic_coverage fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
